APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award

Be recognised. Save lives.

The AEHEA celebrates healthcare institutions across Asia Pacific that demonstrate outstanding commitment to environmental hygiene, infection prevention and quality patient care.

Apply Now Learn more

About APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award (AEHEA)

AEHEA is a regional recognition programme led by the Asia Pacific Society of Infection Control (APSIC). It spotlights institutions that embed rigorous environmental hygiene standards into everyday clinical practice.

Commitment to IPC

Demonstrate leadership in infection prevention and control through structured environmental hygiene programmes.

Innovative practices

Showcase evidence-based innovations that reduce infection risk and improve patient safety.

Quality of care

Reinforce a culture where clean, safe environments support the highest standards of care.

“

Message from Award Program Chair and APSIC President

"Environmental hygiene is the silent foundation of patient safety. AEHEA recognises the teams who make that foundation visible, measurable and excellent every single day."

A/Prof. Moi Lin Ling

Program Chair AEHEA

"APSIC is proud to lead this initiative. By celebrating excellence, we inspire healthcare institutions across the region to invest in the environments where healing happens."

Prof. Anucha Apisarnthanarak

President APSIC

Why Join the APSIC Environmental Hygiene Excellence Award?

01

Be Recognised

Gain regional visibility for your institution's dedication to environmental hygiene, IPC leadership and patient-centred care.

02

Save Lives

Demonstrate how rigorous hygiene practices translate directly into fewer infections, shorter stays and safer outcomes.

Celebrated on the regional stage

Winners are announced at the APSIC conference and featured across APSIC communications and partner networks.

Prestigious recognition, not a monetary prize

The award honours excellence, commitment and impact — a credential that signals trust to patients and peers.

Frequently Asked Questions

Healthcare institutions across the Asia Pacific region that have implemented environmental hygiene and IPC programmes may apply. Both single sites and hospital networks are welcome.

Applications open in Q1 and close in Q3 each cycle. Shortlisted institutions are reviewed by an independent panel of IPC experts before finalists are announced.

There is no fee to apply. AEHEA is supported by APSIC and its partners to keep participation open to institutions of all sizes.

Entries are evaluated on commitment to IPC, evidence of innovative practices, measurable outcomes, staff engagement and the overall quality of care delivered.

Currently applications are institution-led. Peer nominations may be submitted as supporting letters within an institution's own entry.

Subscribe below for programme updates, deadline reminders and announcements. You can also follow APSIC's official channels for regional IPC news.

Want to stay informed?

Register your interest and be the first to know when applications open.

AEHEA

Asia Pacific recognition for environmental hygiene excellence, infection prevention and quality patient care.
